subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-04-01 in Stuttgart
subcodes.first_line: Your receptivity is the reason God has sent me to Stuttgart, that here I might cry out: 'How blessed is this day!'
subcodes.first_line_orig: استعداد شما سبب شد که خدا مرا باستتکارت فرستاد تا بملکوت بهآءالله ندا کنم
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @power of the Manifestation of God
